name: Import Repos as Projects
description: Bulk-import GitHub or GitLab repositories as Nexora projects in one shot. Fetches live repo list from the credential, matches against requested repos (by full_name or name), and creates a project for each match. Skips duplicates by default.

args.name: credential_id
args.description: Git credential to import repos with.

args.name: repos
args.description: Explicit list of repos to import (objects).

args.name: groups
args.description: Only import repos under these groups/orgs.
